text: Standing just outside a room bustling with people, I feel a sense of anticipation. There is a pulse of conversation and thought, as if ideas are being exchanged like electricity in the air. Moving into the next space, the colorful wall and displays evoke curiosity—the words about invention, research, and evolving connection spark within me a blend of hope and introspection. I am simultaneously an observer and a participant in the unfolding story of human creativity. Being here, I am awed by the collective pursuit of insight, yet humbled by my own smallness in this constellation of innovation.
